creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of audio/wmtune

 diff -urN audio/wmtune/pkg/DESCR.orig audio/wmtune/pkg/DESCR
--- audio/wmtune/pkg/DESCR.orig Thu Jan 20 13:35:41 2000
+++ audio/wmtune/pkg/DESCR      Thu Jan 20 13:35:58 2000
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 Dock app radio program for the BT848/878 cards.
 In particular, this program works with the
 Happauge WinTV cards with onboard FM tuners.
+
+WWW: http://soren.org/linux/wmtune/
